void.pattern.rule: Can gather from the four locations diagonally adjacent to your placement.
wind.pattern.rule: Can gather from the four locations orthogonally adjacent to your placement.
fire.pattern.rule: Can gather from the four other spaces in your placement’s column.
water.pattern.rule: Can gather from the four other spaces in your placement’s row.
earth.pattern.rule: Can gather from the stack you placed upon.
welcome.spec.objectives: Players will score points for these two objectives at the end of each season.
welcome.player.objectives: You will score points for these two objectives at the end of each season.
welcome.spec.key.elements: At the end of the game, players will score two points for each of these Key Elements on their Gorinto
welcome.player.key.elements: At the end of the game, you will score two points for each of these Key Elements on your Gorinto
score.suspens: Score calculations... Who will achieve a harmonious victory ?
you.win: Victory! You win the game with {score} Wisdom Points
player.wins: {player} wins the game with {score} Wisdom Points
you.win.tie.breaker: Victory! You win the game with {score} Wisdom Points and {tiles} Elements
player.wins.tie.breaker: {player} wins the game with {score} Wisdom Points and {tiles} Elements
2.players.tie: Marvelous! {player1} and {player2} share a harmonious victory with {score} Wisdom Points and {tiles} Elements
3.players.tie: Incredible! {player1}, {player2} and {player3} share a harmonious victory with {score} Wisdom Points and {tiles} Elements
perfect.tie: It can’t be... It’s a perfect tie! All players share a harmonious victory with {score} Wisdom Points and {tiles} Elements
The season is cleared. Moving to the nex: The season is cleared. Moving to the next season...
Redistributing the Round Order tiles wit: Redistributing the Round Order tiles with compassion...
you.must.take: You must take {quantity, plural, one {# tile} other {# tiles}} from the mountain
player.must.take: {player} must take {quantity, plural, one {# tile} other {# tiles}} from the mountain
you.must.move: You have to move an element from one path to the mountain
player.must.move: {player} has to move an element from one path to the mountain
goal1: Score each stack that is the <0>same</0> height as one or more of your other stacks.
goal2: Score each stack that is a <0>different</0> height than all of your other stacks.
goal3: Score each stack with an <0>odd</0> number of tiles.
goal4: Score each stack with an <0>even</0> number of tiles.
goal5: For each element, the player or players with the <0>tallest</0> stack (of at least one tile) scores 3.
goal6: For each element, the player or players with the <0>shortest</0> stack (of at least one tile) scores 3.
goal.d.hint: Imagine your stacks lined up from shortest to tallest (including stacks of zero).
goal7: Score each stack that is a <0>different</0> height than the stack in the <0>middle</0>.
goal8: Score the stack in the <0>middle</0> three times.
goal9: Score your <0>tallest</0> stack, your <0>shortest</0> stack, and also any stack tied with either of them.
goal10:
Score your <0>tallest</0> stack.
Score your <0>shortest</0> stack (of at least one tile) twice.
goal11: Score <0>twice the difference</0> between your <0>tallest</0> stack and your <0>shortest</0> stack.
goal.11.hint: A stack of zero may be counted as your shortest stack.
goal12:
If you have any empty stacks, score zero.
Otherwise, score your <0>shortest</0> stack seven times.
tuto.welcome:
A Gorinto is a Japanese commemorative shrine.
In this game, each player <0>builds a Gorinto</0> in order to gain wisdom. The player with <0>the most wisdom</0> at the end of the game will win!
tuto.your.gorinto: This is your Gorinto. For now, it is empty, but during the game you will gather tiles here corresponding to the <0>5 elements</0>: Earth, Water, Fire, Air and Void.
tuto.your.opponents: You are the <0>black player</0>, and play in this game against <0>2 opponents</0> controlled by the device: the red player and the white player.
tuto.seasons: A game of Gorinto lasts <0>4 seasons</0>, indicated by this marker.
tuto.wisdom.points:
They are displayed here. You must end the game with <0>more Wisdom points</0> than your opponents to win.
There are 2 ways to gain Wisdom points in Gorinto...
tuto.goals:
Here are the Goals for this game. At the end of each Season, you will score Wisdom points based on these goals.
This is <0>the main way</0> to score Wisdom points!
tuto.keys:
Only once, at the end of the game, you will also gain <0>2 points</0> of Wisdom per <0>Key Element</0> in your Gorinto.
These items can make a difference, so don’t overlook them!
tuto.board: Here is the board, also called the Mountain. It is here you will place, then gather tiles during the game.
tuto.path:
Around the Mountain is the Path.
On your turn, you must take a tile from a Path, and move it into the Mountain <0>in a straight line</0>.
tuto.move.fire: Let’s play! Start by moving this <0>Fire tile</0>, in a straight line, to the second column.
tuto.take.intro: Good! It’s time to complete your turn <0>by gathering a tile</0> from the Mountain.
tuto.patterns:
In Gorinto, the tiles you can gather depend on the element you move to the Mountain. 
<0>Each element has its own pattern...</0>
tuto.pattern.fire:
You have just moved a Fire tile. The <0>Fire</0> allows you to gather tiles in <0>the same column</0>.
To make it easier for you, we’re highlighting the tiles you can gather.
tuto.gather: Gather {number, plural, one {one tile} other {# tiles}}
tuto.take.with.fire.pattern: Now gather your first tile! <0>Take this Wind tile</0> and place it <0>in your Gorinto</0> at the bottom left.
tuto.end.first.turn:
Well done! The Wind tile is definitely in your Gorinto.
It is now up to your opponents to play.
tuto.move.wind:
It’s your turn again!
Move this Wind element, still in a straight line, into the third row.
tuto.wind.pattern: The <0>Wind</0> allows you to gather from the 4 tiles <0>adjacent</0> to the one you just placed.
tuto.understanding:
Remember the first round: you gathered a Wind tile in your Gorinto.
Because of this, your <0>Understanding</0> of the Wind element has increased! Now you will gather <0>2 tiles</0> instead of just one by moving a Wind tile.
tuto.understanding.wind: Your Understanding of an element is always equal to <0>1 plus the number of tiles of that element</0> in your Gorinto.
tuto.take.with.wind: Gather this brown tile and the blue tile.
tuto.end.second.turn: Well done! Your Understanding of <0>Earth and Water</0> just increased, and now it’s your opponents’ turn.
tuto.move.water: Now move this Water element into <0>the second row</0>.
tuto.water.pattern:
Water allows you to gather tiles in <0>the same row</0> as the moved element. For every elements, except one, you can only take the top tile of the piles, and you can't pick more than once in a unique pile during a turn.
Gather the 2 brown tiles from the Earth element.
tuto.end.third.turn: Your opponents are now playing. Once their turn is over, there will not be enough tiles left in the Path for a new turn: in this case, <0>this is the end of the Season</0>.
tuto.push.marker: The Season marker moves forward one space.
tuto.count.goals:
Each player scores points based on <0>the 2 Goals.</0>
The first Goal gets you 2 points, because you have 1 Water element, and 1 Wind element.
The second Goal gets you 5 points: 3 for Earth, 1 for Water, and 1 for Wind. Congratulations!
tuto.your.wisdom.points: You now have <0>7 points of Wisdom</0>, that’s a good start!
tuto.start.new.season:
At the beginning of a new Season, 10 new tiles are randomly drawn to fill the Path.
The White player <0>has the lowest score</0>, he/she <0>starts.</0>
tuto.move.earth: Now move this Earth element into <0>the fourth row.</0>
tuto.earth.pattern: Unlike the other elements, Earth allows you to gather the tiles <0>below</0> the tile you moved. It's the only element which allow you to collect more than 4 tiles !
tuto.understanding.earth: You have already gathered 3 Earth tiles. Your Understanding of this element is 4: therefore you gather <0>4 tiles.</0>
tuto.take.with.earth: Now gather all the available tiles in the pile where you just moved the Earth element.
tuto.move.void: Now move this purple Void element to the fifth column.
tuto.void.pattern: The Void allows you to gather the tiles located <0>diagonally</0> from the tile you moved.
tuto.understanding.void: Your Understanding of the Void is 2. However, in this case you can only gather one tile, because there are no tiles in the 3 other diagonals.
tuto.must.take.max: Beware! You always <0>have to gather as many tiles as possible</0>, even if it’s not in your best interest...
tuto.reminder.scoring: Now you know everything! Remember that you score points based on <0>Objectives</0> at the end of each season, as well as 2 points per <0>Key Element</0> at the end of the game.
tuto.end.help:
You are now free to make your own choices.
If you need to find the gathering rules, click here.
Good luck!
tuto.2.players: For your information, in a two-player game, one tile from the Path is discarded each turn, except for the first turn of each player.
tuto.last.season: This is the last Season! Be sure to gather lots of Key Elements, without losing sight of the Goal cards!
You have finished your first game! You c: You have finished your first game! You can now play with your friends, or meet other players via our Discord server.
you.tactical.remove: 2-player game alternative : you must remove one tile from a path
player.tactical.remove: 2-player game alternative : your opponent must remove one tile from a path
warning.no.tiles: This move will not allow you to gather any tiles. Would you like to proceed?
give-up.dialog.p4: You will also abandon the tournament.
